mapper.select: SELECT fp.id, fp.user_id, fp.name, fp.bio, fp.file_group_id, fp.farm_description, u.email FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id WHERE u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND fp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY fp.name

SELECT fp.id, fp.user_id, fp.name, fp.bio, fp.file_group_id, fp.farm_description, u.email, u.status FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id WHERE fp.id = #{id} AND fp.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT fp.id, fp.user_id, fp.name, fp.bio, fp.file_group_id, fp.farm_description, u.email, u.status FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id WHERE fp.user_id = #{userId} AND fp.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO farmer_profiles (user_id, name, bio, file_group_id, farm_description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{bio}, #{fileGroupId}, #{farmDescription}) RETURNING id, user_id, name, bio, file_group_id, farm_description
mapper.update: UPDATE farmer_profiles SET name = COALESCE(#{name}, name), bio = COALESCE(#{bio}, bio), file_group_id = COALESCE(#{fileGroupId}, file_group_id), farm_description = COALESCE(#{farmDescription}, farm_description), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL RETURNING id, user_id, name, bio, file_group_id, farm_description
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id WHERE fp.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT fp.id, fp.user_id, fp.name, fp.bio, fp.file_group_id, fp.farm_description, u.email, u.status, u.created_at FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id WHERE fp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT fp.id, fp.user_id, fp.name, fp.bio, fp.file_group_id, fp.farm_description, u.email, u.status, u.created_at FROM farmer_profiles fp JOIN users u ON u.id = fp.user_id WHERE fp.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{userId}
